item.title: Personal-Blog 3.0
item.description: Brand new personal web Hi, this is my personal web 3.0. 1.0 I use WorldPress 2.0 I use Gredia, which is a develop tools for people can use github develop web. 3.0 I use Hugo.

item.title: 如何使用hugo建立个人网站
item.description: 环境设置 安装git set

item.title: About
item.description: Hi, I am Kane. I am a graduate student at Johns Hokpins University, majoring in information systems. Before that, I earned a bachelor’s degree in computer science and informaton system at UVM(Class of 2021). 嗨，我是Kane。目前是约翰斯·霍普斯大学(Johns Hokpins University)的在读研究生，专业是信息系统。 在此之前，我在UVM(2021届)获得了计算机科学和信息系统学士学位。 I use Hugo to create this website. It is written in Go. It makes use of a variety of open source projects including: 我使用Hugo创建这个网站。这是用GO语言写的。 它利用了各种开源项目，包括: https://github.com/russross/blackfriday https://github.com/alecthomas/chroma https://github.com/muesli/smartcrop https://github.com/spf13/cobra https://github.com/spf13/viper Learn more and contribute on GitHub.
